title: The X-Mark Promise
description: On pages 18, this part focuses on the crew leaves alabasta behind. The Straw Hats move toward departure while Marines, allies, and the kingdom deal with the consequences of the battle.
scene: This scene belongs to the The Crew Leaves Alabasta Behind sequence. The important beat is the dialogue and action around Luffy, Vivi, Zoro, Nami, Usopp.
summary: The Straw Hats move toward departure while Marines, allies, and the kingdom deal with the consequences of the battle.
